top_signals.title: Lenovo Shares Near All-Time High After Strong AI Growth
top_signals.summary: Lenovo Group Ltd. shares were on track to close at their highest on Friday after the company reported strong growth in AI-related earnings that offset difficulties from rising component prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
